name: Valentine’s Series!- Denki Kaminari
description:
HELLO MY LITTLE SPARKS! Today we have Denki! This one will be pretty cute today so I’m not really gonna waste too much time on this part, mainly because it’s 3:30AM and I’m tired but I DONT CARE HAHAHAHAHAHAHAH

sorry

ANYWAYS shoutout to Autumn_Danielson for suggesting Denki this time!

FemPOV 1. MalePOV 3. Denki throws a whole concert with the bois to get your attention before asking you to be his valentine.

FemPOV 2. MalePOV 4. You find Denki in your dorm in a pikachu onesie with a paper around his neck.

IM SO SORRY MY LOVES, I can’t think of another scenario, please PLEASE if you have an idea, tell me in the comments and I’ll add whichever one I think I can write best!

Let me know who I should do next! I’m NOT doing All Might, Endeavor, or Mineta, but the others are fine!

Remember you all are loved, talented, and gorgeous, mwah! Here’s a cookie 🍪 I love you!
creator: AsherDaFloof
